query: Look across the specs, CI state, and technical debt and tell me which three improvements deserve attention first.
Our specs manifest seems stale. Rebuild it from disk and use the result to recommend the next work item.
Resume the engineering improvement backlog at its saved checklist and process my selected item.
Add the approved cache-control response option and prove it with regression tests.
Users see duplicate webhook deliveries; diagnose the cause and patch it.
Assess this proposed implementation plan for missing edge cases, but do not rank repository priorities.
